home.subtitle: Privacy-first document translation powered by on-device AI. Works offline and completely free.

support.title: Enjoying offline.cat?
support.description: The core will always be free. If it helped your translation workflow or saved you time, consider fuelling the next feature with a coffee.

openSource.title: Built in the open
openSource.description: offline.cat is free software. Contributions are welcome.

github.title: View on GitHub
github.description: Explore the source and watch the repo to get notified about new releases.

releases.title: All releases
releases.description: Downloads for every platform, including Windows, Linux, and older versions.

dropzone.label: Drop a file or click to browse

create.unsupported: Requires Chrome 138+ with on-device translation enabled.

editor.discardDescription: Your translation progress will be lost. The download button in the header lets you save your work first.

error.notFound: The requested page could not be found.
error.fileLoadMessage: Something went wrong while loading the file.

meta.homeDescription: Translate documents offline. No servers. No accounts. No exceptions.
meta.editorDescription: Translate documents offline. No servers. No accounts. No exceptions.

settings.title: Local models
settings.subtitle: Pick a model to translate with. Models run entirely on your device.
settings.searchPlaceholder: Search models by name, lab, or repo...

desktopOnly.title: Desktop app only
desktopOnly.description: The local model picker is only available in the offline.cat desktop build. The web version uses Chrome's on-device Translator API instead.
